context.goal: Move from the first page of the opened document to page 3 using the page navigation controls.
context.cues: TIAEditor document viewer in view-only/view mode, centered PDF-like page, top display manipulation bar shows page indicator '1 / 9' and green navigation arrow buttons.

anchors.locator: green right-arrow button immediately to the right of the page number field

procedure.expect: Document advances from page 1 toward the next page; the page indicator increments.
Document is on page 3 and the page indicator shows '3 / 9'.
